raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/2023, with my Citi Card - Master Card, I inadvertently started a transaction for {$710.00} to book a hotel with a company, " Get A room '', also known as " XXXX XXXX ''. I thought i was on a hotel website but they are an intermediary. 

They charge $ XXXX " convenience fee '' to book a hotel room. it is easily overlooked because many municipalities have various fees and taxes. Additionally, they do not allow any cancellations, whatsoever, without a 50 % penalty. this is highly unusual - no hotels have this kind of policy. 

Before completing the transaction- i realized it was a rip off. I never entered the XXXX XXXX " pin code '' sent to my mobile device. In other words, I never completed the transaction. 

i have not been able to reach resolution. I find Citi Bank Credit Cards at fault because they should not facilitate business with this merchant. and they sided with the merchant in my dispute.
